traces.mapping_rationale: The notebook explicitly removes Id before building the model-side feature frame, matching the bank's identifier-drop action.
The notebook maps EJ from A/B to 0/1 directly, which is a clean bank match.
The notebook applies median imputation to the sparse biomarker subset and uses this as the canonical current-bank missing-value repair branch.
The notebook joins greeks.csv onto train rows by Id for the optional validation-side branch.
The notebook parses Epsilon with coercion because Unknown values exist in the official file.
The notebook standard-scales the numeric biomarker frame after core repairs, matching the non-primary standard scaling branch.

traces.section: Selective Log Transform For Skewed Biomarkers
traces.mapping_rationale: The notebook applies log1p to a selective subset of skewed columns before the scaling branch, matching the bank's selective log-transform row.

omitted_notebook_steps.section: Inspect Sparse Columns And Header Quirk
omitted_notebook_steps.note: The notebook strips whitespace from BD / CD / CW / FD headers, but the current candidate bank does not have a rename-columns action.
